S.FORM: I 1968 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 29 a romi'ad masofoc ci Kolinda Grabar-Kitaroviƒá , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Croatia anini i ci Kolinda Grabar-Kitaroviƒá, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 19 a romi'ad. Her presidential term ended on 18 February 2020.
S.PHON: i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ko~u…æin…¨~…Æa *rab~b~var-kitaro~ub~vi* , ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ¶ro~uatia anini i ¶i ko~u…æin…¨~…Æa *rab~b~var-kitaro~ub~vi*, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ. ƒß…ôr pr…ôsi…¨~…Æ…ôntia…æ t…ôrm …ôn…¨~…Æ…ô…¨~…Æ o~un ** f…ôb~b~vro~u~uarj ****.
S.FORM: I 1968 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 29 a romi'ad masofoc ci Kolinda Grabar-Kitaroviƒá , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Croatia anini i ci Kolinda Grabar-Kitaroviƒá, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 19 a romi'ad. Her presidential term ended on 18 February 2020.
